feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: S4/HANA Cloud - How to block Customers and Supplier from posting.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm working on a project in S4/HANA Cloud Public Edition and I need to block suppliers and customers from posting. I found a Business Object that maintains Business Partners, but it doesn't have a 'Posting Block' option. The closest solution I've found is an ODATA V2 API that has this option within its structure. I would prefer doing this with a Business Object; do you know if there is one that can do the job?


Business Object doc link: https://api.sap.com/bointerface/I_BUSINESSPARTNERTP_3

ODATA V2 API doc link: https://api.sap.com/api/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/overview


Kind Regards,
Marcelo Romeiro

entry.title: How to Assign Business Partner to Communication System in S/4HANA Public Cloud Using CBO or ABAP?
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, is it possible to assign a Business Partner to a Communication System using Custom Business Object (CBO) or ABAP (via In-App Extensibility)?

If so, what is the recommended approach or workaround to achieve this via coding?

Appreciate any guidance or examples.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: DRC
entry.content: I just want know is there any difference about DRC function on public cloud with private cloud ？

entry.title: PCE edition EPIC
entry.content: Are there anyone can answer my question? If we want to use EPIC function for cash management on PCE (SAP Private cloud edition) , do we need to buy extra licence  ?

entry.title: Unable to mass update product master data
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts, 

We tried to perform a mass update of product master data using the "Manage Product Master Data" app, but we encountered an error message : 


The error message appears when we select the relevant products and click on the "Mass Processing" button.

Could you please advise ? 

Thank your for your help

entry.title: SAP Cloud Access Controls cannot get transported: Object Type DRAS not permitted
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have created an access control (define accesspolicy) on SAP S/4 Public Cloud. It works perfectly but I am not able to release the the task to which the access control belongs.

I get the following error: "Object DRAS ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER is not permitted. Object type DRAS cannot be transported."

ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER looks like this:

define accesspolicy ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER {
    @EndUserText.label: 'Business Partner of User'
    define aspect ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER as
        select from ZI_BusinessUser with user element UserID
            {
                BusinessPartner //bypass when = 'bypass_value'
            }
            
}

This way I am able to define a role which checks for the business partner number of the logged on user:

@MappingRole: true
define role ZSOMEROLE {
    grant
        select
            on
                ZSOMECDSVIEW
                    where
                     CratedBy = $session.user or
                     (_SomeAssociation.BusinessPartnerId ) = aspect ZBUSINESSPARTNEROFUSER 
                     ;
}

 

Any help is very appreciated. I guess I will need to raise a SAP incident for this.

Thank you
Daniel

entry.title: TCS Configuration for Scrap Sales in India (SAP Public Cloud) – Threshold Based Rate Application
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We need guidance on the complete configuration steps for calculating TCS (Tax Collected at Source) on scrap sales in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – India localization.

Our requirement is as follows:

  • 0.1% TCS should apply when the customer crosses the ₹50 lakhs threshold in the financial year.

  • 1% TCS should apply from the first scrap sale if no PAN is available (i.e., no threshold consideration).

  • This TCS should be calculated in the scrap sales order accordingly.

Kindly provide the detailed configuration steps, including:

  • Relevant Tax Code / Condition Type settings

  • Customer master data changes (if any)

  • Threshold control setup

  • Assignment in tax procedure or SSCUI details (if applicable)

This is critical for compliance and we request your urgent help.

Thanks & regards,
Vishal

entry.title: SAP DRC automation public cloud Netherlands
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are currently activating/configuring DRC in SAP public cloud.
In the Netherlands we can use this for automatic filing of VAT return and ECLS.

To enable this we need to provide an authentication file provided by a Trust Service Provider. But it is not clear to me which certificate is needed.
Any idea which one is needed?
Maybe there are more, but if I check the website of the RDI and select the link to the trusted providers I see a few "certificates" mentioned:
QeRDS
QCert for ESig
QCert for ESeal
QWAC
QTimestamp

Appreciate your support.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to view audit logs ?
entry.content:
We need to identify how to view audit logs for changes made by super users (administrator users) in SAP, or, failing that, have a record to review changes made by administrator users.
Please tell us how we obtained this information.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Production Schedule Profile field is not visible in Product Master Data App
entry.content:
We are facing issue where we are unable to maintain "Production Schedule Profile" field in Manage Product Master Data App. 

 

How can we add it ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: account assignment error after OKB9 MAINTENANACE.
entry.content: account assignment error after OKB9 MAINTENANACE.

entry.title: Issue with Automatic Billing Date in Return Order CBAR
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am currently working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and have encountered an issue with the Customer Return Order (CBAR) process.

When I create a return order with type CBAR, the system automatically generates a billing document (Credit Memo) immediately after Post Goods Receipt (PGR).

In my business case, the original sales order was created on 30-06-2025 and delivery and billing cycle has been completed on the same day 30-06-2025, but the return order was created on 01-07-2025 for material issue. Due to this, the auto-created billing document picks up the return creation date (01-07-2025), which causes issues with receivables reconciliation and period closing.

entry.title: Batch Input on SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Experts.

SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition has the apps for batch input session.

ex.  My Batch Input Sessions(SM35SA), Batch Input My logs(SM35PSM) ...

But, I don't know how to create the batch input session.

What can apps create the batch input session?

entry.title: Mandatory document attachment tab in Manage Certificate Receipts App
entry.content: Client is using the incoming certificate receipts scenario in the system but when inspection lot is created with CTCM status so they need to go to the Manage certificate receipt application to set the certificate satus " Received"

entry.title: sap public cloud release of2508
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

how do we gather information what are changes happend as per module eg:sourcing and procurement in sap public cloud for updates.

how do we check as per our scopes in sap portal what changes that are occuring meanhwile .

 

Kindly guide through this ..

entry.title: How to setup Workflow for Enterprise Project
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

How can I setup workflow for Enterprise Project ?

I have setup it already but it doesn't work for Project Control - Enterprise Projects.

Best regards,

Keratiya D.

entry.title: How to use OBH1/OBH2 on SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Experts.

I have a lot of companies, document types.

I want to use Tr-cd:OBH1/OBH2 on SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition.

If I can't these PG, I can't maintain the number range intervals. Too many maintenance...

Please help.

entry.title: Why is there no email notification for the batch payment forwarding To-do?
entry.content:
• The normal payment batch process triggers an email notification for the recipient.
  • When forwarding the payment batch to another recipient, the email notification is not triggered.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: badi
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 

We have a requirement as whenever we create PO selecting a tax code of 1A it should automatically populate po text in header level .as i researched it can be achieved through BADI.

I can see that creation of badi is user friendly is it possible to create without badi or can someone provide how find exact badi and to implement it in sap public cloud .

entry.title: IFRS or IndAS (Indian Accounting Standards) or INAP (India GAAP)?
entry.content:
For India company codes, what should be the accounting principle suggested by SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

Since there are only 2 options in CBC Activity 'Assign Accounting Principles to Ledgers and Company Codes' - IFRS/INAP....

The business is saying that INAP is for medium scale companies and Ind AS is for the larger companies where IndAS is similar to IFRS.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
